2605.07865.title: KL for a KL: On-Policy Distillation with Control Variate Baseline
2605.07865.paper_summary: On-Policy Distillation (OPD) has emerged as a dominant post-training paradigm for large language models, especially for reasoning domains. However, OPD remains unstable in practice due to the high gradient variance of its single-sample Monte Carlo estimator, and recipes for stable training are still immature. We propose vOPD (On-Policy Distillation with a control variate baseline), which casts OPD as policy-gradient RL and stabilizes it by introducing a control variate baseline-canonically a value function -- from the RL literature. We show that the OPD value function admits a closed form as the per-token negative reverse KL divergence between the student and the teacher, available directly from the already-computed forward pass with no additional critic or inference. Existing stabilization methods either compute the full token-level reverse KL over the entire vocabulary, adding significant overhead, or restrict it to a top-k support, biasing the objective. vOPD instead preserves the lightweight single-sample estimator, subtracting the value function as a detached baseline to keep the gradient unbiased while reducing variance. Furthermore, we show that a top-k approximation of the baseline further lowers cost without compromising performance. Across mathematical and scientific reasoning benchmarks, vOPD consistently outperforms vanilla OPD and matches the most expensive full-vocabulary baseline, offering an efficient stabilization of On-Policy Distillation through principled RL variance reduction.
2605.07865.paper_summary_zh: 在訓練後的範疇中，政策蒸餾（On-Policy Distillation, OPD）已成為大型語言模型的主流方法，特別是在推理領域。<lb/>然而，由於其單樣本蒙地卡羅估計器的高梯度方差，OPD在實踐中仍然不穩定，而穩定訓練的方案仍然不成熟。<lb/>我們提出了vOPD（帶有控制變量基準的政策蒸餾），將OPD視為政策梯度強化學習（RL），並通過引入控制變量基準——一個來自強化學習文獻的價值函數——來穩定它。<lb/>我們顯示，OPD的價值函數可以以封閉形式表示為學生和教師之間每個標記的負反向KL散度，這可以直接從已計算的前向傳播中獲得，而不需要額外的評論者或推理。<lb/>現有的穩定化方法要麼計算整個詞彙表的完整標記級反向KL，增加了顯著的開銷，要麼將其限制在前k個支持上，從而使目標產生偏差。<lb/>相反，vOPD保留了輕量級的單樣本估計器，將價值函數作為獨立基準進行減法，以保持梯度無偏並降低方差。<lb/>此外，我們顯示基準的前k個近似進一步降低了成本，而不影響性能。<lb/>在數學和科學推理基準上，vOPD始終優於普通的OPD，並且與最昂貴的全詞彙基準相匹配，通過原則性的強化學習方差降低提供了有效的政策蒸餾穩定化。
2605.07865.author: Minjae Oh et.al.
2605.07865.authors: Minjae Oh, Sangjun Song, Gyubin Choi, Yunho Choi, Yohan Jo
